subtitle: Smart Farming for a Better Future

soil.flower_desc: Helps flowers bloom and fruits grow

fertilizer.need_leaf: Soil needs nutrition for leaf growth

landing.aboutDesc: Agro360 is your digital agricultural companion. We bridge the gap between traditional farming and modern technology, creating a digital twin of your farm to optimize every decision you make.
landing.captureDesc: Take a photo of your crop or upload soil data via the dashboard.
landing.analyzeDesc: Our AI processes the input using millions of data points.
landing.diagnoseDesc: Receive instant health reports and actionable treatment plans.
landing.optimizeDesc: Apply recommendations to boost yield and reduce waste.
landing.toolsDesc: Everything you need to manage your farm, from soil to sale.
landing.aiDiseaseDesc: Identify plant diseases instantly with 98% accuracy using our advanced computer vision models.
landing.smartCropDesc: Get data-driven suggestions for the best crops to plant based on your soil and climate data.
landing.realtimeSoilDesc: Monitor NPK levels, moisture, and pH balance to ensure optimal growing conditions.
landing.yieldPredDesc: Forecast your harvest quantity and quality using historical data and predictive analytics.
landing.riskDesc: Stay ahead of weather patterns and pest outbreaks with proactive alerts and advisories.
landing.communityDesc: Connect, share knowledge, and trade with a network of modern farmers.
landing.aiParagraph: Traditional farming relies on intuition. AI farming relies on precision. With Agro360, you're not just guessing; you're knowing.
landing.earlyDetectionDesc: Spot diseases before they spread to your entire crop.
landing.resourceOptDesc: Save water and fertilizer by applying exactly what's needed.
landing.yieldMaxDesc: Predictive analytics to help you harvest at the perfect time.
landing.testimonial1: Agro360 saved my potato harvest this year. The early blight detection was spot on, weeks before I could see it with my own eyes.
landing.testimonial2: The soil analysis feature helps me apply the exact amount of fertilizer. I've saved 30% on costs this season.
landing.joinFarmers: Join thousands of farmers using AI to grow better, faster, and smarter.

dashboard.bestCropDesc: Find suitable crops based on soil & climate
dashboard.pestAlertDesc: High risk of Aphids in Cotton fields due to humidity.
dashboard.irrigationDesc: Schedule watering for tomorrow morning before sunrise.
dashboard.fertilizerAlertDesc: Due for NPK application in Field A.

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to access your smart farm

chatbot.title: Agro360 AI Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Always here to help
chatbot.dragHint: Drag header to move • Enter to send
chatbot.errorConnect: Sorry, I'm having trouble connecting. Please check if the server is running.
chatbot.errorGeneral: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.
chatbot.cleared: Chat cleared! How can I help you today?
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm your Agro360 AI assistant. Ask me anything about farming, crops, or use me to navigate the app!
